# 🐛 Bug Report

## 📋 Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->



## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->



## ❌ Actual Behavior

<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened -->



## 📸 Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->



## 🌍 Environment

### System Information

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 13.2, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 115, Firefox 116, Safari 16.5]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.16.0]
- **npm Version**: [e.g. 9.5.1]

### Application Information

- **Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Platform**: [Web / iOS / Android]
- **Deployment**: [Local / Staging / Production]

### For Mobile Apps

- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 14 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- **OS Version**: [e.g. iOS 17.2, Android 13]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0 (Build 123)]

### For Backend Issues

- **MongoDB Version**: [e.g. 6.0.5]
- **RAM**: [e.g. 16GB]
- **CPU**: [e.g. Intel i7]

## 🔍 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->



## 📊 Error Logs

<!-- If applicable, add error logs, stack traces, or console output -->

```
Paste error logs here
```

## 🔧 Possible Solution

<!-- If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug, describe them here -->



## 📝 Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues -->

- Related to #
- Similar to #

## 💡 Additional Information

### Frequency

<!-- How often does this bug occur? -->

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Often
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Rarely
- [ ] Once

### Severity

<!-- How severe is this bug? -->

- [ ] Critical - System crash, data loss
- [ ] High - Major functionality broken
- [ ] Medium - Feature not working as expected
- [ ] Low - Minor inconvenience
- [ ] Very Low - Cosmetic issue

### Impact

<!-- How does this bug impact users? -->

- [ ] Blocks user workflow
- [ ] Causes data loss
- [ ] Security vulnerability
- [ ] Performance issue
- [ ] UI/UX problem
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## 🧪 Debugging Attempts

<!-- Have you tried to debug this issue? What did you try? -->
